estimates.input_regime: manual publishability review over queue estimator state initialization and trade-update atoms
estimates.notes: Provider review metadata below records per-atom confidence and limitations; this top-level estimate keeps the file compatible with the Supabase uncertainty backfill.

uncertainty_notes: Initializer uses a fixed displayed queue-ahead default and should be interpreted as a deterministic state seed, not market-data reconstruction.
Trade-only queue consumption model; cancellations and priority changes are intentionally out of scope.
